title: Conditionals & Decision Making
story_hook: Should I buy this phone? Should I attend the class? Computers make millions of decisions per second. Today you become the decision-maker.

content.story: Should I buy this phone? Should I attend the class? Computers make millions of decisions per second. Today you become the decision-maker.

content.title: If-Else in Programming
content.focus_note: Watch how real-life choices become code.

content.doc_md: If-else, switch, ternary - with Indian student examples (marks > 40 -> Pass).

visualizer.task: Animate branching paths for if-else decisions.

practice_problems.prompt: Check if marks > 40 -> Pass else Fail.
Check if a number is positive, negative, or zero.
Find the largest of three numbers.
Check if a year is a leap year.

quiz_questions.question: What does an if-else statement do?
quiz_questions.explanation: If-else selects a path based on a condition.

quiz_questions.question: Which is a short form of if-else?
quiz_questions.explanation: Ternary is the compact form of an if-else.

quiz_questions.question: Switch statements are useful when
quiz_questions.explanation: Switch is clean for multiple equality checks.

content.task_prompt: Build a grade calculator: input marks and output grade with if-else.

recall_questions: When should you use switch vs if-else?
How do variables feed decision logic?
content.identity_affirmation: You are now the decision-maker in code.
content.streak_reminder: Keep the streak alive - loops are next.
